basic_details.job_title: NIT Kurukshetra Adjunct Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Serving and retired scientists, engineers, physicians, professionals, academicians, practitioners, policymakers, officials and managers with excellent academic record and commitment to quality teaching and research. Specific qualifications vary by department. For some cutting-edge technologies, 5+ years of experience is sufficient; otherwise, 10+ years is desirable. Post-graduate/Ph.D. degree may not be essential for industry/research candidates.
qualification.details: Excellent academic record Commitment to quality teaching and research Experience comparable to at least the top one third of the regular faculty in professional expertise and reputation. Normally, at least 10 years of experience in the relevant field. For emerging and cutting-edge technologies, persons with more than 5 years of experience can also be considered. For industry/research candidates, domain knowledge should be of significant value, and Post-graduate/Ph.D. degree may not be an essential qualification.

salary_details.pay_scale: Adjunct Professor: Max Rs. 1,80,000/month, Rs. 8,000/day, Rs. 2,000/hour. Adjunct Fellow: Max Rs. 1,20,000/month, Rs. 6,000/day, Rs. 1500/hour.
salary_details.details: Adjunct Professor: Max Rs. 1,80,000/- per month, Rs. 8,000/- per day, Rs. 2,000/- per hour. Adjunct Fellow: Max Rs. 1,20,000/- per month, Rs. 6,000/- per day, Rs. 1500/- per hour.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Kurukshetra Adjunct Faculty Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nitkkr.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download NIT Kurukshetra Adjunct Faculty Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Adjunct Faculty position at NIT Kurukshetra?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the second round of the rolling advertisement is 20-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q3. What are the salary ranges for Adjunct Faculty?
faq.answer: Adjunct Professors can earn up to Rs. 1,80,000/month, Rs. 8,000/day, or Rs. 2,000/hour. Adjunct Fellows can earn up to Rs. 1,20,000/month, Rs. 6,000/day, or Rs. 1500/hour.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any specific age limit mentioned for the Adjunct Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a particular age limit for the Adjunct Faculty positions.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum experience required for an Adjunct Faculty role?
faq.answer: Generally, 10 years of experience is desirable, but for emerging technologies, 5+ years may be sufficient. Industry/research candidates might not need a postgraduate/Ph.D. degree.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Adjunct Faculty at NIT Kurukshetra?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a presentation and an interview, followed by a medical examination.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of NIT Kurukshetra, which is www.nitkkr.ac.in.

faq.question: Q8. What documents need to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Self-attested photocopies of required documents, including certificates, photograph, signature, and ID proof, should be attached with the application form.

faq.question: Q9. To whom should the application form be sent?
faq.answer: The completed application form should be sent to "The Registrar, National Institute of Technology, Kurukshetra-136119 (Haryana)."

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
